target.title: docs: document markdown and shared helpers
target.body:
## Summary

- Document markdown render marker, link, and option contracts used by `renderMarkdownWithMarkers`.
- Document inline-code scanner state and code-span lookup invariants used by streaming chunk/code awareness.
- Document markdown IR style/link/table contracts, parse options, slicing, and table-aware parse metadata.
- Document markdown chunking/table conversion contracts, including span rebasing and block-mode behavior.
- Document shared balanced JSON extraction and provider schema keyword stripping contracts.
- Document assistant/provider error parsing and UI formatting contracts.
- Document shared lazy loader, message content block visitor, and regexp escaping utility contracts.
- Document shared lazy runtime, safe import specifier, and reserved gateway method scope contracts.
- Document shared node matching and default node resolution contracts.
- Document shared device auth entry/store and adapter contracts.
- Document shared final-tag parser match and attribute-scanning contracts.
- Document shared custom command normalization and validation contracts.
- Document shared scoped expiring id cache method contracts.
- Document shared store writer task and FIFO queue field contracts.
- Document shared requirements metadata and diagnostics field contracts.
- Document shared runtime requirement field contracts for eligibility checks.
- Document shared thread binding lifecycle timestamp and timeout override contracts.
- Document shared node list and pairing payload field contracts.
- Document shared usage entry, aggregate, and result payload field contracts.
- Document shared usage timeseries point and series payload field contracts.
- Document shared entry metadata requirement evaluator input/result field contracts.
- Document channel mention gating fact, policy, and decision field contracts.
- Document channel command gating authorizer and control-command field contracts.
- Document channel thread binding spawn policy field contracts.
- Document channel target parser and mention-pattern policy helper contracts.
- Document channel ack reaction gate and cleanup helper contracts.
- Document direct-DM pre-crypto guard policy field contracts.
- Document channel route projection and native command session target helper contracts.
- Document command/inbound conversation resolution contracts and fallback semantics.
- Document inbound event context builder, supplemental filter, and command-turn helper contracts.
- Document channel reply pipeline, history window, and bot-loop guard helper contracts.
- Document message receipt, durable-send intent, and receipt id ordering contracts.
- Document live preview adapter and channel message capability proof contracts.
- Document durable message send/state and receive acknowledgement contracts.
- Document message outbound bridge result/adapter fields, rendered batch plan items, receipt id precedence, poll kind normalization, and rich payload kind inference.
- Document durable ingress queue and durable inbound receive journal method contracts, claim-token guards, race cleanup, and bounded pruning.
- Document message receive context method contracts and durable final requirement option semantics.
- Document inbound reply compatibility aliases, record/dispatch bridge params, and durable fallback ownership while removing a stale file-header overview.
- Document channel turn delivery fields, adapter hooks, durable fallback ownership, thread override semantics, and unknown-send queue policy.
- Document channel turn record/history options, assembled/prepared turn fields, lifecycle log fields, adapter methods, and runner params.
- Document SDK channel config write helpers and scoped/top-level/hybrid account config semantics.
- Document channel account snapshot projection, config presence detection, URL credential redaction, and persisted-auth metadata caching.
- Document channel match metadata, direct/parent/wildcard precedence, nested allowlist decisions, and allowlist candidate matching.
- Document direct-DM allow-from merging, access-group parsing, sender allow checks, and legacy authorizer bridge behavior.
- Document inbound debounce decisions and draft stream loop throttle/retry behavior.
- Document reply prefix context/options and typing-start guard trip/error semantics.
- Clarify the shared link/style close-stack ordering invariant without adding file headers or import-adjacent comments.

- Document thread-binding message labels and conversation label id-disambiguation helpers.

- Document sender identity validation, shared channel logging helpers, and safe inbound session metadata recording.

- Document webhook numeric option normalization, memory guard APIs, in-flight release behavior, and configured account id normalization.

- Document gateway session payload types and silent-reply policy classification/override contracts.

- Document extension-shared passive status, lifecycle, config issue, secret-ref, package version, and ambient proxy helpers.

- Document status-helper runtime lifecycle, computed account snapshot, and dependent credential issue contracts.

- Document migration item, config patch, apply, and redaction helper contracts while removing a stale file-top overview.

- Document QA live-transport scenario ids, selection, coverage, and missing-standard helpers.

- Document browser host-inspection facade helpers and plugin config runtime fallback behavior.

- Document provider model shared normalization and replay-family helper contracts while removing a stale file-top overview.

- Document direct command-status runtime params and unauthorized reasoning-state privacy guard.

- Document assistant text signature/extraction options and text segment joining semantics.

- Document scoped bearer-auth retry, OAuth form/PKCE helper, and shared chunk resolver contracts.

- Document account fallback and optional channel setup helper contracts.

- Document persistent and claimable dedupe helper contracts.

- Document provider tool compatibility normalization and inspection helper contracts.

- Document allowlist config edit helper contracts.

- Document provider onboarding preset and model merge helper contracts.

- Document provider catalog shared helper contracts.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm test packages/markdown-core/src/render-aware-chunking.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/tables.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/ir.table-block.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/ir.table-code.test.ts`
- `pnpm test packages/markdown-core/src/render-aware-chunking.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.code-span-awareness.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts`
- `pnpm test packages/markdown-core/src/ir.chunking.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/ir.table-block.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/ir.table-code.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/tables.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/render-aware-chunking.test.ts`
- `pnpm test packages/markdown-core/src/ir.chunking.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/tables.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/ir.table-block.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/ir.table-code.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/render-aware-chunking.test.ts`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: markdown render docs for marker/link/options contracts and close-stack ordering comments; markdown code-span docs for inline scanner state, fenced-code precedence, and unfinished-span chunk protection; markdown IR docs for style/link/table contracts, parse options, slicing, and table-aware parse metadata; markdown table/chunk docs for span rebasing, table mode, link preservation, and block-mode conversion behavior; shared JSON/schema helper docs for balanced fragment offsets and provider schema keyword stripping shape preservation; assistant error formatter docs for provider payload/status/html/internal-error parsing and bounded UI copy; shared utility docs for lazy loader cache/retry behavior, message content block reference semantics, and regexp literal escaping; shared runtime/policy docs for lazy runtime proxies, Windows-safe import specifiers, and reserved gateway method scope coercion; node matching docs for candidate identity fields and blank-query default picker behavior; device auth docs for entry/store fields and adapter read/write contracts; final-tag parser docs for match offsets/flags and quoted-attribute scanning; custom command config docs for slash command normalization, description trimming, validation issues, and accepted-command duplicate tracking; scoped expiring id cache docs for record/has/clear method behavior; store writer queue docs for task promise hooks and per-path FIFO drain state; requirements docs for resource categories, metadata inputs, config diagnostics, and remote capability hooks; config-eval docs for RuntimeRequires binary/env/config eligibility fields; thread binding lifecycle docs for binding/activity timestamps and idle/max-age override semantics; node list docs for effective node, pending pairing, paired node, and pairing list payload fields; usage payload docs for session usage entries, aggregate groups, and gateway usage result fields; usage timeseries docs for bucket values and cumulative fields; entry status docs for presentation metadata, requirement diagnostics, and eligibility result fields; mention gating docs for inbound facts, channel policy, implicit mention kinds, and decision fields; command gating docs for authorizer state, access-groups-off fallback mode, and control-command gate fields; thread binding policy docs for spawn kind/context and resolved policy fields; channel target/policy docs for parser order, normalized keys, provider-native ids, and deny-over-allow mention-pattern precedence; ack reaction docs for gate facts, WhatsApp adapter mapping, send-handle lifecycle, and post-reply cleanup; direct-DM guard docs for accepted kinds, timestamp skew, byte caps, and rate limits; route projection docs for delivery-context conversion, conversation/binding projection, native command session target resolution, and unscoped-account matching; conversation resolution docs for binding placement lookup, command/inbound precedence, fallback ordering, and provider stop-on-null semantics; inbound event context docs for builder params/results, supplemental visibility filters, command-turn derivation, and self-quote media suppression; channel turn helper docs for reply pipeline params, history window methods, and bot-loop guard facts; message receipt docs for source/part/receipt fields, durable requirement triggers, durable send intent fields, and receipt id ordering; live message docs for preview draft/finalizer adapter fields, capability proof results, capability listing/proof helpers, and fallback cleanup; durable message docs for batch params/outcomes, send context preview state, recovery records, receive ack context, and original-error preservation during cleanup; message outbound bridge docs for legacy result/adapter fields, rendered batch plan items, receipt id precedence, poll kind normalization, and rich payload kind inference; durable ingress docs for queue/journal method contracts, claim-token guards, race cleanup, tombstones, and bounded pruning; message receive/capability docs for ack method contracts, stage ownership, media URL filtering, and durable final option semantics; inbound reply bridge docs for compatibility aliases, record/dispatch params, durable fallback ownership, and stale header removal; channel turn delivery docs for delivery fields, adapter hooks, durable fallback, thread override semantics, and unknown-send queue policy; channel turn adapter docs for record/history options, assembled/prepared turn fields, lifecycle log fields, adapter methods, and runner params; channel config helper docs for write helpers, accessor fallback, top-level section shape, deletion behavior, and hybrid default-account semantics; channel snapshot/presence docs for credential projection, URL redaction, configured-signal discovery, and persisted-auth metadata caching; channel match/allowlist docs for match metadata, fallback precedence, nested allowlist decisions, wildcard behavior, and ordered candidate matching; direct-DM allow-from docs for access-group parsing, DM/group allowlist merging, sender checks, legacy runtime fields, and optional pairing challenge ownership; inbound debounce/stream docs for debounce bypass rules, resolved debouncer state, stream loop methods, background error ownership, and false-result retry semantics; reply prefix/typing guard docs for prefix context/options, route params, non-throwing error behavior, and tripped guard skip semantics; thread binding/conversation label docs for timeout labels, thread names, intro/farewell params, cwd detail ordering, and id disambiguation; channel diagnostics/session docs for sender identity validation, logging helper params, lazy session runtime loading, and best-effort metadata writes; webhook guard/account docs for integer option normalization, in-memory limiter/counter/anomaly APIs, bounded Map LRU touch semantics, idempotent release, and configured-account id dedupe; session/silent-reply docs for gateway identity/model/runtime/list/patch payload fields, policy types/defaults, webchat classification, and direct-chat audible guard; extension-shared docs for passive status/traffic summaries, passive monitor lifecycle, logger-backed runtime fallback, open-DM allowFrom validation, status issue helpers, deferred promises, plugin config issue mapping, read-only env secret checks, package version lookup, and ambient proxy/TLS resolution; status-helper docs for runtime lifecycle/account status adapter fields, computed account status inputs/results, config-issue account fields, dependent credential issue collector options, and optional runtime transport field emission; migration helper docs for item status helpers, summaries, config patch details/path reads/merges/writes/conflict checks, patch/manual item factories, patch apply race recheck, manual apply, redaction helpers, and stale file-top overview removal; QA live transport scenario docs for standard ids, scenario fields, baseline set, requested selection, coverage collection, duplicate ordering, and missing-standard detection; browser/config runtime docs for browser executable fields, browser host-inspection facade cache and wrappers, runtime config requirement, plugin config object resolution, scalar config rejection, and live/startup config fallback; provider model shared docs for provider id normalization, provider-prefixed owner hints, preview model id normalization, replay family semantics/options, captured replay family policy, and stale file-top overview removal; command status runtime docs for direct status params, synthetic /status reply helper contract, session-key canonicalization note, channel activation callback, and unauthorized reasoning-state privacy guard; assistant text segment docs for text signature/extraction option fields, explicit-phase block isolation, optional text concatenation params, join-segment options, and trim output semantics.; fetch auth/OAuth/chunking docs for scoped bearer retry params, original-response preservation, OAuth string-only encoding, PKCE verifier alphabets, and shared chunk resolver fallback ownership.; account fallback/optional setup docs for explicit-account no-redirect behavior, plugin install guidance, no-core-config-mutation adapter behavior, and fail-loud wizard finalization.; persistent dedupe docs for TTL/cache/file options, namespace/time/error overrides, warmup/check APIs, claim result states, and commit/release waiter propagation.; provider tool compatibility docs for unsupported-keyword diagnostics, Gemini/OpenAI/DeepSeek normalization and inspection helpers, OpenAI strict-schema violation paths, and compat family hook selection.; allowlist config edit docs for path metadata, group/name resolution result types, legacy DM path resolution, prototype-safe account write targets, compact default-account storage, normalized removal matching, and legacy cleanup after canonical writes.; provider onboarding docs for preset applier modes, alias preservation, normalized agent/provider config writes, primary model handling, default/catalog model merges, model allowlist insertion, and stale file-top note removal.; provider catalog shared docs for configured entry projection, live catalog cache key/TTL behavior, manifest catalog conversion, configured model reads, native streaming usage support checks, compat application, and file-top note removal.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout, Node/Vitest through repo `pnpm test` wrapper.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `git diff --check`; `pnpm test packages/markdown-core/src/render-aware-chunking.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/tables.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/ir.table-block.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/ir.table-code.test.ts`; `pnpm test packages/markdown-core/src/render-aware-chunking.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.code-span-awareness.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts`; `pnpm test packages/markdown-core/src/ir.chunking.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/ir.table-block.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/ir.table-code.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/tables.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/render-aware-chunking.test.ts`; `pnpm test packages/markdown-core/src/ir.chunking.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/tables.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/ir.table-block.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/ir.table-code.test.ts packages/markdown-core/src/render-aware-chunking.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/agents/agent-tools.schema.test.ts src/agents/schema/clean-for-xai.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-call-argument-repair.test.ts src/agents/cli-output.test.ts`; `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-helpers.formatassistanterrortext.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-helpers.isbillingerrormessage.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-helpers/errors.test.ts src/tui/tui-formatters.test.ts`;
